summary: SnapATAC2 can scale to more than 10 million cells.
SnapATAC2 features a matrix-free spectral embedding algorithm applicable to single-cell ATAC-seq, RNA-seq, Hi-C, and methylation data.

SnapATAC2 version 2.3.0 changes the default similarity metric to cosine similarity in tl.spectral. SnapATAC2 version 2.3.0 significantly improves scalability of tl.spectral with cosine similarity having linear time and space complexity. Sna
